text.title: fail2ban-setup Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for fail2ban-setup as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Hardcoding Cloudflare IP ranges in nginx or fail2ban ignoreip. Cloudflare's IP ranges change over time.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Fetch the live list with: curl https://www.cloudflare.com/ips-v4. Stale hardcoded ranges miss new Cloudflare IPs and create silent gaps.
